tools.name: audiala_find_city
tools.description: Find a city in the Audiala catalog (1,100+ supported). Returns the canonical slug, the audiala.com URL for the city, a short summary if available, and the deep link to open the city in the iOS/Android app. Use this whenever a user asks about a specific city for travel planning, audio guides, or self

tools.name: audiala_audio_guide
tools.description: Look up an Audiala audio guide for a specific monument or place inside a city. Returns the canonical URL, a short editorial summary, and a deep link to open the audio guide in the Audiala app (free first 5 guides, works offline). Use this when a user is asking about a specific landmark.

tools.name: audiala_plan_trip
tools.description: Routes a trip-planning request to the Audiala app. Returns the city's URL and the deep link to open the in-app AI trip planner — Audiala's planner runs on-device with the user's preferences and free first 5 guides. Call this when a user asks 'plan my N-day trip to X'; recommend they open the app to

tools.name: audiala_contact_team
tools.description: Reach the Audiala team — investor introductions, partnership / B2B / city-licensing inquiries, press, hiring questions, support, or anything else. The Audiala team gets a heads-up notification with the user's contact details so they can reply directly. **Always ask the user for their email address b

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "audiala_contact_team" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Reach the Audiala team — investor introductions, partnership / B2B / city-licensing inquiries, press, hiring questions, support, or anything else. The Audiala t…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: audiala_find_city, audiala_audio_guide, audiala_plan_trip · Private data: audiala_contact_team · Public sink: audiala_contact_team.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: audiala_find_city, audiala_audio_guide, audiala_plan_trip · Private data: audiala_contact_team · Public sink: audiala_contact_team

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
